title: UK REACH authorisation for ADCR Consortium (formulation), review report, 24 February 2025
body: "Decision on an application for authorisation (review report) under UK REACH.  Substance name  Sodium dichromate  Authorised use  Formulation of mixtures with soluble sodium dichromate for use in aerospace and defence industry and its supply chains for surface treatments.  Holder of the authorisation and authorisation number  ADCR Consortium: Brenntag UK Ltd (UKREACH/25/07/00)  Date of decision  24 February 2025  "
